criteria.description: --field key=value filters entries where key equals value exactly
--field key filters entries where key exists, regardless of value
Field filters combine with other filters via AND semantics

criteria.evidence: 4 tests: ExactMatch (3/5 entries match service=web), ExactMatchNoMatch (0 for nonexistent), WellKnownLevel (2 errors), WellKnownMessage (1 timeout). All non-tautological with distinct expected counts.
3 tests: ExistsOnly (all 5 have service key), ExistsOnlyMissing (0 for absent key), ExistsWellKnownLevel (2/3 with non-empty level). Tests both positive, negative, and well-known field paths.

4 tests: CombineWithLevel (field+level AND), CombineWithKeyword (field+keyword AND), CombineWithTimeAndLevel (3-way AND), MultipleFieldFilters (two field filters AND). All narrow results to 1, proving intersection semantics.

verificationReports.notes: Minor debt: gofmt reports alignment issue in FieldFilter struct (key/value fields). Functional correctness unaffected. 27 total filter tests pass. Build and vet clean.
